verses.sanskrit: एवम् आधर्षितः शूरः शूर्पणख्या खरः ततः ।उवाच रक्षसाम् मध्ये खरः खरतरम् वचः ॥३-२२-१॥
verses.text:
Thus when Shuurpanakha disparaged that valiant Khara amidst demons he is infuriated and spoke these 
highly hurtful words. [3-22-1]

verses.sanskrit: तव अपमान प्रभवः क्रोधो अयम् अतुलो मम ।न शक्यते धारयितुम् लवण अंभ इव उल्बणम् ॥३-२२-२॥
verses.text:
"This fury of mine originating from the disgrace brought on you is like the highly bitter salt water 
that is impossible to contain when ingested. [3-22-2]

verses.sanskrit: न रामम् गणये वीर्यान् मानुषम् क्षीण जीवितम् ।आत्म दुश्चरितैः प्राणान् हतो यो अद्य विमोक्ष्यति ॥३-२२-३॥
verses.text:
"I do not care the valour of that Rama for he is a human with dwindled lifetime, now going to give up 
his life slain by his own misdoings. [3-22-3]

verses.sanskrit: बाष्पः सम्धार्यताम् एष संभ्रमः च विमुच्यताम् ।अहम् रामम् सह भ्रात्रा नयामि यम सादनम् ॥३-२२-४॥
verses.text:
"Control your tears and cast off your despair too, for I will send Rama to the abode of the Terminator 
along with his brother. [3-22-4]

verses.sanskrit: परश्वध हतस्य अद्य मन्द प्राणस्य भू तले ।रामस्य रुधिरम् रक्तम् उष्णम् पास्यसि राक्षसि ॥३-२२-५॥
verses.text:
"Now, you demoness, you will swill that Rama's red hot blood when that short-lived one is hewed down 
to earth with an axe." So Khara assured Shuurpanakha. [3-22-5]

verses.sanskrit: सा प्रहृष्ट्वा वचः श्रुत्वा खरस्य वदनात् च्युतम् ।प्रशशंस पुनर् मौर्ख्यात् भ्रातरम् रक्षसाम् वरम् ॥३-२२-६॥
verses.text:
On hearing the words plunged from the mouth of Khara she is very much gladdened and in all her stupidity 
she further praised her brother highly saying, "you are the best among all the demons..." [3-22-6]

verses.sanskrit: तया परुषितः पूर्वम् पुनर् एव प्रशंसितः ।अब्रवीत् दूषणम् नाम खरः सेना पतिम् तदा ॥३-२२-७॥
verses.text:
Though she denounced him earlier she alone praised him now for which Khara is overjoyed, and then he 
ordered his army commander, namely Duushana. [3-22-7]

verses.sanskrit: चतुर्दश सहस्राणि मम चित्त अनुवर्तिनाम् ।रक्षसाम् भीम वेगानाम् समरेषु अनिवर्तिनाम् ॥३-२२-८॥
verses.text:
"Those who are the followers of my will, whose hustle will be frightful and who will be unretreating 
in combats, such of those demons are there in fourteen thousand numbers, aren't they. [3-22-8]

verses.sanskrit: नील जीमूत वर्णानाम्  लोक हिंसा विहाराणाम् ।सर्व उद्योगम् उदीर्णानाम् रक्षसाम् सौम्य कारय  ॥३-२२-९॥
verses.text:
"And oh, gentle Duushana, those domineering demons are with dark-clouds like complexions, and they are 
the pamperers of genocide, as such, cause them for a belligerency, all at once. [3-22-9]

verses.sanskrit: उपस्थापय मे क्षिप्रम् रथम् सौम्य धनूंषि च ।शरान् च चित्रान् खड्गां च शक्ती च विविधाः शिताः ॥३-२२-१०॥
verses.text:
"For me, oh, gentle one, promptly position my chariot before me along with bows and arrows, amazing 
swords and diverse sharp power bolts. [3-22-10]

verses.sanskrit: अग्रे निर्यातुम् इच्छामि पौलस्त्यानाम् महात्मनाम् ।वधार्थम् दुर्विनीतस्य रामस्य रण कोविद ॥३-२२-११॥
verses.text:
"Oh, war pert Duushana, I wish to start ahead of all the demons of ours, who are the clans-demons of 
the great souled Paulastya, for the purpose of elimination of that evil-minded Rama." So said Khara 
to Duushana. [3-22-11]

verses.sanskrit: इति तस्य ब्रुवाणस्य सूर्य वर्णम् महारथम् ।सत् अश्वैः शबलैः युक्तम् आचचक्षे अथ दूषणः ॥३-२२-१२॥
verses.text:
While Khara is saying thus Duushana heralded saying, "Here comes the great chariot with sun's dazzle, 
yoked with very good horses of variegated colours." [3-22-12]

verses.sanskrit: तम् मेरु शिखर आकारम् तप्त कांचन भूषणम् ।हेम चक्रम् असंबाधम् वैदूर्यमय कूबरम् ॥३-२२-१३॥
verses.text:
That chariot which has a roomy cabin with its rooftop like that of the ridge of Mt. Meru, body embellished 
in gold, wheels golden, gem-studded yoke-to-carriage shaft, all around encompassed with golden artefacts 
like fishes, flowers, trees, mountains, sun, moon, and auspicious birds flocks and stars, and even decorated 
with jingle-bells, endowed with flags, swords, and best horses, and such as it is, Khara embarked on 
it with all his rancour. [3-22-13, 14, 15]

verses.sanskrit: मत्स्यैः पुष्पैः द्रुमैः शैलैः चन्द्र सूर्यैः च कांचनैः ।मांगल्यैः पक्षि सम्घैः च ताराभिः च समावृतम् ॥३-२२-१४॥
ध्वज निस्त्रिंश संपन्नम् किंकिणी वर भूषितम् ।सत् अश्व युक्तम् सः अमर्षात् आरुरोह खरः तदा ॥३-२२-१५॥
खरः तु तान्  महत् सैन्याम् रथ चर्म आयुध ध्वजान् ।निर्यात इति अब्रवीत् प्रेक्ष्य दूषणः सर्व राक्षसान् ॥३-२२-१६॥
verses.text:
On overseeing that great army with chariots, skins shields, weaponry and flags, and even at Duushana 
too, Khara charged all those demons saying "proceed." [3-22-16]

verses.sanskrit: ततः तद् राक्षसम् सैन्यम् घोर चर्म आयुध ध्वजम् ।निर्जगाम जन स्थानात् महानादम् महाजवम् ॥३-२२-१७॥
verses.text:
Then that demonic force with their ghoulish skin shields, weaponry and flags, issued forth from Janasthaana, 
blaring blatantly and foraying dashingly. [3-22-17]

verses.sanskrit: मुद्गरैः पट्टिशैः शूलैः सुतीक्ष्णैः च परश्वधैः ।खड्गैः चक्रैः च हस्तस्थैः भ्राजमानैः स तोमरैः ॥३-२२-१८॥
verses.text:
Wielding maces, dart-bolts, and spears, and also razor-sharp axes, swords and discs, and dreadful power-darts 
and power-bolts that are flashing, iron maces, unusual bows, clubs, scimitars and pounding-shafts, and 
even thunderbolt like weapons that are calamitous in look, that army which comprises fourteen thousand 
fiendish demons that are the followers of Khara's whim, has started from Janasthaana. [3-22-18, 19, 
20]

verses.sanskrit: शक्तिभिः परिघैः घोरैः अतिमात्रैः च कार्मुकैः ।गदा असि मुसलैः वज्रैः गृहीतैः भीम दर्शनैः ॥३-२२-१९॥
राक्षसानाम् सुघोराणाम् सहस्राणि चतुर्दश ।निर्यातानि जन स्थानात् खर चित्त अनुवर्तिनाम् ॥३-२२-२०॥
तान् तु निर्धावतो दृष्ट्वा राक्षसान् भीम दर्शनम् ।खरस्य अथ रथः किंचित् जगाम तत् अनन्तरम् ॥३-२२-२१॥
verses.text:
On seeing the outrush of those demons of diabolic appearance, then Khara's chariot also proceeded a 
little later at their behind. [3-22-21]

verses.sanskrit: ततः तान् शबलान् अश्वान् तप्त कांचन भूषितान् ।खरस्य मतम् आज्ञाय सारथिः पर्यचोदयत् ॥३-२२-२२॥
verses.text:
Then the charioteer set spurs on those colourful horses that are adorned in polished gold according 
to the notions of Khara. [3-22-22]

verses.sanskrit: संचोदितो रथः शीघ्रम् खरस्य रिपु घातिनः ।शब्देन आपूरयामास दिशः स प्रदिशः तथा ॥३-२२-२३॥
verses.text:
When the chariot of enemy destroyer Khara is driven that impetuously, it has started to swell earth's 
four cardinal quarters and inter-quarters with turbulence. [3-22-23]

verses.sanskrit: प्रवृद्ध मन्युः तु खरः खर स्वरेरिपोः वध अर्थम् त्वरितो यथा अंतकः ।अचूचुदत् सारथिम् उन्नदन् पुनर्महाबलो मेघ इव अश्म वर्षवान् ॥३-२२-२४॥
verses.text:
He whose voice is thunderous and whose rancour escalated speedily, and who is hastening forward like 
the Terminator intending to destroy his enemy, that Khara repeatedly hurried the charioteer shouting 
at him loudly like a overwhelming cloud that is going to storm stones. [3-22-24]
